title: Focus Track Button
prompt:
Create a production-ready Focus Track Button using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. It is a compact, deliberate action that turns a reviewing state into a focused state: a small cyan track travels beneath the selected label while a quiet count changes from three open notes to one focused note. Place it on #F4F5F6, inside a white Bento panel with a 22px radius, #ECECEE border, soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Cyan is the only bright accent. Do not place a gradient on the card or rely on decorative icons alone.

Use a semantic button with aria-pressed and a polite live region. The entire 44px target toggles on click, Enter, and Space; include an obvious 3px dark focus ring. Hover lifts the control 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Move the track with a spring at stiffness 380 and damping 30, then crossfade the label and count over 160ms. The inactive and active states must both be understandable without motion. Use local state only, no timers, random values, storage, network requests, or fixed positioning.

At 320px, keep the label and count on one readable line; on wider detail previews, allow the surrounding panel to breathe without changing the control's meaning. Prefer transform and opacity animations. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by switching immediately or using a 120ms opacity fade. Meet AA contrast, retain logical tab order, and use ARIA only where native button semantics need reinforcement. Return paste-ready TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure-CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css: /* Suggested HTML: */ .uiwiki-focus-track{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;min-height:48px;width:min(100%,340px);padding:0 16px;overflow:hidden;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:#111;color:#fff;font:800 14px/1 system-ui;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-focus-track i{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:16px;width:96px;height:4px;border-radius:9px;background:#22d3ee;transition:transform 260ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.uiwiki-focus-track[aria-pressed="true"] i{transform:translateX(112px)}.uiwiki-focus-track:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-focus-track:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-focus-track,.uiwiki-focus-track i{transition:none}}
